Every Tom Brady TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Air Yards
  • Data Viz
  • Search

Tom Brady has thrown 738 touchdown passes in his NFL career, more than anyone in the history of the game. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways. Clicking on a list item will show you all the TD passes for that criteria, and clicking on each specific TD link will show the actual play.

TDs by Opponent

  • Dolphins (72)

    1. Brady to Bernard across the middle (2021)
    2. AB is off to the races for the TD (2021)
    3. Brady goes through his progressions and finds AB eventually (2021)
    4. Brady hits Evans with the deep ball (2021)
    5. Evans walks it in for Brady's 5th TD of the day (2021)

    8. Brady to Patten again for the TD (2002)

    26. (2022)
    27. (2022)

TDs by Week

Tom Brady has thrown 88 playoff TDs, the most in NFL history. For comparison, that's more TDs than Josh Freeman (81), Joey Harrington (79) or Jay Fiedler (72) threw in their entire career.

  • Week 1(44)

    1. Brady's first TD pass as a Buc is to OJ Howard (2020)
    2. Brady drops it into Evans across the field (2020)
    3. First Brady TD of 2021 goes to Godwin (2021)
    4. Brady to Gronk to go up by 7 (2021)
    5. Brady finds Brown deep for the TD to take back the lead (2021)
    6. Brady to Gronk again to extend the lead (2021)
    7. (2022)
    8. Brady finds an open Fauria for the opening TD of the season (2002)
    9. Brady to Donald Hayes for a 40 yard TD (2002)
    10. Brady to Branch for the 3rd TD of the night (2002)
    11. Brady 16 yard TD to Branch (2004)
    12. Brady deep to Patten for his 2nd TD throw (2004)
    13. Brady finds his tight end off of play action for the TD (2004)
    14. Brady to Branch for the first TD of the season (2005)
    15. Brady finds Tim Dwight for the TD (2005)
    16. Brady finds Troy Brown for the season's first points (2006)
    17. Kevin Faulk with the diving TD catch (2006)
    18. Brady to Welker for the first Pats TD of 2007 (2007)
    19. Brady finds Watson at the back of the end zone for the TD (2007)
    20. Moss outruns triple coverage for his first TD as a Patriot (2007)
    21. Brady to Watson 18 yard TD (2009)
    22. Brady to Watson 16 yard TD (2009)
    23. Nicely designed WR screen gets Welker in the end zone (2010)
    24. Welker juuuust gets into the end zone (2010)
    25. Rob Gronkowski's first ever TD (2010)
    26. Brady to Gronk 10yd TD (2011)
    27. Brady to Welker 2yd TD (2011)
    28. Brady to Hernandez 1yd TD (2011)
    29. Brady to Welker 99yd TD (2011)
    30. Brady to Hernandez 23 yard TD (2012)
    31. Brady to Gronkowski 2 yard TD (2012)
    32. Brady finds Edelman in the back of the end zone to open the scoring (2013)
    33. Brady patiently waits for Edelman to get open in the end zone (2013)
    34. A patient Brady finds Gronk for the TD (2014)
    35. Brady to Gronk 16yd TD (2015)
    36. Brady to Gronk 6yd TD (2015)
    37. Brady to Chandler 2yd TD (2015)
    38. Brady to Gronk 2yd TD (2015)
    39. Brady to Gronk TD 69 TDs no longer (2018)
    40. Brady to White 12 yard TD (2018)
    41. Dorsett’s first TD as a Patriot (2018)
    42. Flash opens the scoring on the season with a TD (2019)
    43. Brady hits Dorsett on the post route for a TD (2019)
    44. How does a WR get so open? (2019)

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Tom Brady has accumulated 12,270 yards. That's more passing yards than Rex Grossman (11,015) threw in his entire career.

  • 99 yards (1)

    1. Brady to Welker 99yd TD (2011)

TDs by Air Yards

Air yards are determined by how far the ball traveled in the air relative to the line of scrimmage, so negative air yards are passes behind the line of scrimmage (screen plays, for example).

  • -7 yards (2)

    1. Brady to Smith 41 yard TD (2001)
    2. White takes the screen pass to the house on 3rd down (2019)

  • -6 yards (2)

    2. Lewis receiving TD (2016)

    1. Brady to Faulk 38yd TD (2009)

TDs by Receiver

Tom Brady has connected with Rob Gronkowski for 105 touchdowns, second only behind Peyton Manning and Marvin Harrison (114 TDs). And then he's also thrown TDs to 97 other players.

    3. Brady rolls out and then throws back to Howard (2021)

    2. Brady to Bernard across the middle (2021)
    3. Bernard takes the quick slant in for the TD (2021)
